summary: Iteration 28 — ResourceDashboard personalization fully tested. 23/23 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified: riley@test.com sees personalized 'Good morning, Riley' dashboard with all 4 KPI cards, action items banner (1 high priority), correct empty states for My Allocations/Recent Timesheets/My Leaves. Admin sees unchanged Command Center with team KPIs, Project Portfolio, and Resource Availability Matrix. Navigation buttons work. Regression pages load clean.
critical_code_review_comments: ResourceDashboard.js correctly uses isResource check in Dashboard.js (line 254) to early-return the personalized view. Logic is clean.
today/weekStart/weekEnd computed at module level (not inside component) — works correctly but won't auto-update if the page is left open past midnight. Not a bug for this MVP.
displayName falls back from resource.name → email prefix → 'there' which is safe.
timesheetStatusFromActionItems correctly maps action_item types to missing/draft/ok for the Timesheet Status KPI.
seed_data_creation: None — no persistent test data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 confirms ResourceDashboard feature fully working. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration28_resource_dashboard.py (23 tests). Riley's allocation (Jul 10-20) is now in the past so 'No active allocations' empty state is correct and expected. Admin Command Center unchanged. All riley regression pages (/my-allocations, /my-timesheets, /time-off) load without errors. Action items banner shows 1 high priority item (missing timesheet) for riley.

verified_features.my_allocations_empty_state: PASS — 'No active allocations' shown (riley's Jul 10-20 alloc is past)
verified_features.recent_timesheets_empty_state: PASS — 'No timesheet history' with CTA button
verified_features.my_leaves_empty_state: PASS — 'No upcoming leaves' with Add time off CTA
verified_features.admin_command_center: PASS — shows Command Center, not resource dashboard
verified_features.admin_team_kpis: PASS — Active Projects (2), Team Utilization (19%), Over-Allocated (2), On The Bench (11)
